name: hugging_face_transformers__princeton_nlp_unsup_simcse_roberta_base__au_ccf95072
title: princeton-nlp/unsup-simcse-roberta-base
description: An unsupervised sentence embedding model trained using the SimCSE approach with a Roberta base architecture. Framework: Hugging Face Transformers. Functionality: Feature Extraction. API call: AutoModel.from_pretrained('princeton-nlp/unsup-simcse-roberta-base').

name: hugging_face_transformers__ganjinzero_umlsbert_eng__automodel_from_pre_81413d59
title: GanjinZero/UMLSBert_ENG
description: CODER: Knowledge infused cross-lingual medical term embedding for term normalization. English Version. Old name. This model is not UMLSBert! Github Link: https://github.com/GanjinZero/CODER Framework: Hugging Face Transformers. Functionality: Feature Extraction. API call: AutoModel.from_pretrained('GanjinZero/UMLSBert_ENG').

name: hugging_face_transformers__hubert_large_ll60k__hubertmodel_from_pretra_57159276
title: hubert-large-ll60k
description: Hubert-Large is a self-supervised speech representation learning model pretrained on 16kHz sampled speech audio. It is designed to deal with the unique problems in speech representation learning, such as multiple sound units in each input utterance, no lexicon of input sound units during the pre-training phase, and variable lengths of sound units with no explicit segmentation. The model relies on an offline clustering step to provide aligned target labels for a BERT-like prediction loss. Framework: Hugging Face Transformers. Functionality: Feature Extraction. API call: HubertModel.from_pretrained('facebook/hubert-large-ll60k').

name: hugging_face_transformers__rasa_labse__automodel_from_pretrained_rasa_labse
title: rasa/LaBSE
description: LaBSE (Language-agnostic BERT Sentence Embedding) model for extracting sentence embeddings in multiple languages. Framework: Hugging Face Transformers. Functionality: Feature Extraction. API call: AutoModel.from_pretrained('rasa/LaBSE').

name: hugging_face__stabilityai_stable_diffusion_2_inpainting__stablediffusi_6bef15b5
title: stabilityai/stable-diffusion-2-inpainting
summary: Image generation and modification based on text prompts
description: A Latent Diffusion Model that uses a fixed, pretrained text encoder (OpenCLIP-ViT/H) to generate and modify images based on text prompts. Framework: Hugging Face. Functionality: Image generation and modification based on text prompts. API call: StableDiffusionInpaintPipeline.from_pretrained('stabilityai/stable-diffusion-2-inpainting', torch_dtype=torch.float16).
